head.text: Pain first in right then in left temple ; s. Pain in right temple and eye ; l. Pain in left Pain in left temple, jaw and eye ; l. Great heaviness of head ; s. Itching of scalp ; s.

eyes.text: Smarting of eyes ; s. Itching of internal canthus of left eye ; l. Pain in right eye and temple ; l.

nose.text: Very acute sense of smell ; s. Smarting and dryness in nostrils ; s. Purulent discharge from nose ; s.

face.text: Pain in left upper jaw, eye and temple ; l.

stomach_abdomen.text: Rumbling and grumbling in epigastric region ; l. Sharp cutting pain in abdomen above umbilicus ; l. Rumbling of flatus : with pain in left superior flexure of colon, followed by speedy discharge of flatus ; in transverse colon ; in region of sigmoid flexure ; s. Pain in region of descending colon ; l. Shooting reports of flatus in abdomen ; s. Grumbling in lower bowels ; l. Great distension of abdomen ; l. Flashing heat in superior abdomen and stomach ; l.

urinary.text: Severe pains in left kidney, with paroxysms of pain running along ureter and in back ; nausea and occasional vomiting. θ Renal calculus. Diminution of contractile power of bladder ; l. Kidney disorders or gravel with pain in back.

back.text: Pain in first dorsal vertebræ ; l. Itching over left scapula ; s. Pain in lumbar region ; l. Pain in left lumbar region ; l. Pain in region of lumbar vertebræ ; l.

extremities.text: Aching in top of right shoulder ; s. Pain in right biceps flexor cubiti near elbow ; s. Pain in left shoulder and arm ; s.

fever_chill.text: Backache alternating with chilliness ; l. Flushing of heat followed by copious sweats.

generalities.text: Right : pain in temple ; in eye ; aching in top of shoulder ; pain in biceps flexor cubiti near elbow. Left : pain in temple, jaw and eye ; itching of internal canthus of eye ; pain in upper jaw ; pain in tonsil ; pain in superior flexure of colon ; severe pain in kidney ; itching over scapula ; pain in lumbar region ; pain in shoulder and arm. Pain in right then in left temple ; in eye ; in jaw ; in r. eye and temple ; in left upper jaw, eye and temple ; in l. tonsil ; in left superior flexure of colon ; in region of descending colon ; along ureter and back ; in first dorsal vertebræ ; in lumbar region ; in left lumbar region ; in region of lumbar vertebræ ; in right biceps flexor cubiti near elbow ; in left shoulder and arm. Severe pain : in left kidney. Sharp cutting pain : in abdomen above umbilicus. Aching : in top of right shoulder. Backache : alternating with chilliness. Smarting : of eyes ; in nostrils. Dryness : in nostrils. Heaviness : of head. Great distension of abdomen. Flushing heat : in superior abdomen and stomach. Itching : of scalp ; of internal canthus of left eye ; over left scapula.
